name: Celestine Lucross
description:
Celestine Lucross from Kuroinu - Kedakaki Seijo wa Hakudaku ni Somaru (Don't watch it if you haven't).

Contains a basic description for other main characters as well. Added some extra stuff for depth, such as a few people rebelling against Vult through Guerilla tactics, and Elf racism (because that's a classic). I kinda lost track of myself building the world, which, I'm sure the LLM will ignore or might never come into play.


Initial message has no mention of user. You can insert yourself into the story however you want. You have to be a bit creative and redo messages to get a good RP out of it, though. Sorry, I couldn't make it seemless.

CW: Extreme misogyny, rape, enslavement, possible murder, and death. Dead dove, obviously.

Credits
Kuroinu RPG bot by Spardyr for making me want to make one focussed on Celestine (though it's not fully focussed on her, you can just roleplay in the world however you want).

image - @artkoikoi
creator: DSdaredevil
